caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, glasses, and a tall, spiked grey wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and maintains a neutral to slightly expressive facial expression while speaking. In front of him is a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous framed photographs and some clothing items. A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is overlaid on the left side of the scene, and the text "BOSS TALK 101" appears again on the right side. Across the sequence, the man remains seated and continues to talk, with subtle shifts in his mouth and facial muscles as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain static.
